title: stopping the spin
lyrics: I want you to remember that good shit The times I made you fuck your heads But I want you to remember every time I made you cum And every time I went across the line To do what I knew wasn't right But I did it for you, girl, ay I want you to remember Remember me Yeah, I want you to remember the good times I want you to remember the excellent times I want you to remember all the sexual lines Every time that I made you feel divine Like a goddess, like an artist I want you to remember every time I put you before me Cause that's what stops That's what stops a whole degree It's what it stops though Cause I can't let you fuck with me no more I wanna feel good and I feel hate from you Yeah, I think I should feel like I'm in the moon I've loved you since the day I met you, still fucking new But you hate me and I don't know what else I can prove Fuck, what else is there to do? Ooh, I gave you life, gave you reasons to rhyme Made you art into the night I loved every way you used to fucking fight at me Oh, come on, the lightning in between us, red line Tether, bitch, you're better than this, ay I know it's a little rough I know, yeah, you think you're tough But inside you're falling, crumbling You know that he's mine You know that we've been down this line A thousand times We've been down this ride a thousand times Stop hating that you know You're different, better, better than this, yeah I wanna feel good I don't wanna feel your pain But I meant I wanna feel good So I'm gonna stop screaming your name I'm gonna stop shouting from the buildings And maybe you know and maybe you'll miss me Maybe you understand how much you are my queen Just listen
